frames.name: Color Variables - Fresh Light and Dark Glass
frames.purpose: 展示颜色变量、状态色和主题模式

frames.name: Typography and Spacing
frames.purpose: 展示字体、字号、间距和圆角

frames.name: Icon and Status Language
frames.purpose: 展示 lucide 图标、状态 chip、金额语义色

frames.name: Buttons and Icon Buttons
frames.purpose: 主按钮、次按钮、危险按钮、图标按钮、禁用和加载态

frames.name: Cards and List Rows
frames.purpose: 交易卡片、导入行卡片、设置 action card、统计卡片

frames.name: Filters and Segmented Controls
frames.purpose: 月份筛选、状态筛选、类型筛选、搜索和清空

frames.name: Drawers and Confirm Modals
frames.purpose: 记账抽屉、行编辑抽屉、高风险确认弹窗

frames.name: Dashboard Mobile 390
frames.purpose: 本月摘要、待确认周期账单、最近流水、记一笔入口

frames.name: Transactions Mobile 390
frames.purpose: 流水卡片、筛选底部抽屉、复制/模板动作入口

frames.name: Transaction Drawer Mobile
frames.purpose: 普通支出和共同支出高频录入

frames.name: Settlement Mobile 390
frames.purpose: 谁给谁、金额解释、复制文案、登记结算

frames.name: Settings Desktop
frames.purpose: 账号、账本、元数据、模板周期、导入导出、备份诊断分区

frames.name: Import Entry Desktop
frames.purpose: 来源选择、上传区、权限提示、历史批次入口

frames.name: Import Preview Desktop
frames.purpose: 批次摘要、状态筛选、行表格、提交阻断

frames.name: Import Preview Mobile 390
frames.purpose: 导入行卡片、状态 chip、行编辑入口

frames.name: Import Row Editor Drawer
frames.purpose: 分类、账户、标签、可见性、跳过和疑似确认

frames.name: Commit Confirm Modal
frames.purpose: 导入、跳过、疑似、错误数量二次确认

frames.name: Import Rule Manager Desktop
frames.purpose: 规则列表、优先级、归档恢复、命中解释

frames.name: Import Rule Manager Mobile 390
frames.purpose: 规则创建编辑、多标签选择、归档恢复在移动端无横向滚动

frames.name: Rule Hit Explanation States
frames.purpose: 规则命中、无规则、归档规则不命中、推荐元数据名称展示

frames.name: Rule Metadata Warning
frames.purpose: 规则引用归档分类、账户或标签时的提示与替换路径

frames.name: Light Theme Dashboard Exploration
frames.purpose: 评估 Fresh Light 是否适合全局主题迁移

frames.name: Calendar and Report Drilldown
frames.purpose: v1.3+ 月历视图和报表钻取探索
